headline: Forget Tesla for Retirees: Here Are 3 Value-Driven Automotive Stalwarts to Buy Right Now
summary: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is once again sucking up financial oxygen, with Reddit’s wallstreetbets crowd posting sentiment scores as high as 88 (Very Bullish) on robotaxi, Optimus, and China-deal chatter. Tesla closed at $404.11 on May 19, 2026, against a trailing P/E of 373 and a forward P/E of 208, with a PEG ratio of 5.9. ... Forget Tesla for Retirees: Here Are 3 Value-Driven Automotive Stalwarts to Buy Right Now

headline: The Only Exception In The Automotive Industry: Why Ferrari Breaks All The Rules
summary: Ferrari N.V. stands alone in the auto sector, boasting stable 22% profit margins and a filled order book through 2027. Read more on RACE stock here.

headline: A Look At Dolby Laboratories (DLB) Valuation After General Motors Supplier Of The Year Recognition
summary: Dolby Laboratories (DLB) just picked up General Motors’ 2025 Supplier of the Year and Overdrive Award, drawing fresh attention to how its Dolby Atmos audio is being built into upcoming vehicles, including Cadillac’s 2026 EV lineup. See our latest analysis for Dolby Laboratories. Even with the General Motors award and upcoming investor conference appearances, Dolby Laboratories’ recent share price performance has been weak. The 30 day share price return is down 16.44% and the 1 year total...

headline: Aspen Aerogels: Stability With Some Green Shoots In Sight
summary: Aspen Aerogels' Q1 revenues plunged over 50% to $37.9M, but sequential EBITDA improvement and a $100M net cash position provide runway. Read more on ASPN here.
